additional_exhibits: Exhibit D — Area Development Agreement (PDF pages 138-157)

grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive right to operate one Cupbop restaurant at approved location using Cupbop marks and system
successor_conditions: Sign then-current franchise agreement (may be materially different)
Be in compliance with all obligations

fee_obligations.late_reporting_consequence: 120% of last royalty + advertising + late fee + interest debited

site_selection_and_construction.site_deadline: 120 days from effective date to purchase or lease approved site
site_selection_and_construction.construction_oversight: Franchisee responsible; franchisor approves contractor and final plans

training_obligations.initial_training: Mandatory for franchisee/Managing Owner and General Manager
training_obligations.replacement_gm_training: Must complete within 90 days of prior GM departure
training_obligations.ongoing_training: Must attend courses franchisor periodically provides at times/locations they designate

operational_obligations.brand_standards_manual: Must follow all standards as updated by franchisor
operational_obligations.menu_compliance: Strict compliance with recipes, methods, specifications
operational_obligations.franchisor_owns_improvements: All improvements/changes to system, whether developed by franchisor or franchisee, owned by franchisor
operational_obligations.reporting: Monthly Gross Sales reports, annual financial statements
operational_obligations.inspection_rights: Franchisor has unlimited access to POS data and right to inspect/audit

termination_triggers.by_franchisee: Only if franchisor breaches and fails to cure, or as allowed by state law

curable_defaults.3_days: Health, safety, or sanitation law violations
curable_defaults.10_days: Monetary defaults, failure to maintain insurance
curable_defaults.30_days: Monetary defaults to third parties, curable operational defaults

noncurable_defaults: Failure to secure approved site within 120 days
Unauthorized use or disclosure of manuals/confidential information
Violating employee recruiting and hiring restrictions
Repeated defaults (pattern of default even if cured)
Cross-default under any other agreement with franchisor or affiliates

transfer_restrictions.no_fee_exception: If transferee is entity franchisee controls
conditions: General release by franchisee and all owners
transfer_restrictions.rofr_scope: Match any offer for assets or ownership interest
transfer_restrictions.death_disability: 180 days to appoint qualified representative or transfer

cross_default.scope: Any default under another agreement between franchisor/affiliates and franchisee/members/affiliates that permits termination

during_term.scope: Cannot divert business, own interest in, or perform services for competing business
during_term.employee_restrictions: Cannot interfere with franchisor's or other franchisees' employees

post_term.geographic_scope: At premises OR within 20 miles of ANY Cupbop Restaurant (existing, operating, or under construction at termination/expiration)
post_term.note: Geographic scope expands as system grows

guaranty.scope: All owners of 5%+ equity interest must sign Guaranty of Obligations
guaranty.provisions_applied: All Franchise Agreement provisions apply to guarantors
guaranty.direct_action: Franchisor may proceed directly against guarantor without first proceeding against franchisee entity

liquidated_damages.trigger: Franchisor termination with cause OR franchisee termination without cause
liquidated_damages.formula: Sum of accrued royalties during immediately preceding 24 full calendar months, plus applicable taxes
liquidated_damages.adjustment: If remaining term < 24 months, reduced to remaining months' royalties
liquidated_damages.payment_deadline: Within 15 days of termination (Note 12 says 30 days — discrepancy between Item 6 table and notes)
liquidated_damages.scope: Compensates for loss of royalties only — does not cover other damages

venue_and_dispute_resolution.mediation: Salt Lake County, Utah, before single mediator, prior to arbitration
venue_and_dispute_resolution.arbitration: Binding, Salt Lake County, Utah (ADA disputes)
venue_and_dispute_resolution.jury_waiver: Present in agreement (subject to state overrides)

insurance_requirements.waiver_of_subrogation: Required in favor of franchisor and affiliates
insurance_requirements.business_interruption: Actual Loss Sustained or Loss of Income basis, up to 12 months
insurance_requirements.franchisor_can_change: May change coverage types, terms, and amounts at any time
insurance_requirements.franchisor_may_obtain: If you fail, franchisor may obtain and charge you cost + it's a default

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must indemnify and hold harmless franchisor and affiliates for claims related to: unauthorized mark use, law violations, restaurant operations, FA breaches

force_majeure.notes: No explicit force majeure clause identified in the franchise agreement text reviewed. Standard commercial contracts may have general provisions but none was specifically called out.

distinctive_clauses.description: If franchisee fails to timely report Gross Sales, franchisor may debit 120% of last royalty and advertising contribution plus late fee and interest
Franchisee must reimburse franchisor for any state taxes on payments, including an amount necessary to provide franchisor with after-tax receipts equal to what it would have received without the tax
All improvements or changes to the system, whether developed by franchisor or franchisee, are owned by franchisor without compensation to franchisee
Franchisor may purchase or sublease the restaurant including premises at fair market value upon termination or expiration
Agreement expressly states no fiduciary relationship; parties are independent contractors
No limits on franchisor's ability to access franchisee's POS or computer system data; must share all security access codes
